CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2004 Continued To Dec-17-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Debra Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California, a Public Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Tracey McCormick was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Robert William Speer as follows:
Principal $27,886.34, no fees or costs.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2004 Continued To Oct-29-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
